name: tracekeep
description: Automatically turn meaningful Codex work into sourced local learning notes, actions, and decisions.

interface.shortDescription: A local second brain that learns from meaningful Codex turns.
interface.longDescription: Tracekeep automatically turns meaningful completed Codex turns into sourced local learning notes, while proposed actions and decisions remain reviewable. It preserves ideas, documents, papers, and URLs; helps resume interrupted work; and searches prior evidence without paid APIs or cloud hosting. The Web dashboard provides learning notes, batch review, search, and settings.
defaultPrompt: What did Tracekeep learn from my recent work?
What unfinished work should I resume?
Search Tracekeep for the paper I studied and include its source.
